<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band04_chunk001.pdf#page=25 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band04 p48 -->

<!-- header: FÜRSTENFELDBRUCK -->


== FURSTENIFFI DRRUCK ==



[[File:Band04_chunk001_p025_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band04_chunk001_p025_img002.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band04_chunk001_p025_img003.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band04_chunk001_p025_img004.jpg|thumb|A, Americ]]



[[File:Band04_chunk001_p025_img005.jpg|thumb|A<sub>2</sub> Europa A<sub>1-4</sub> Erdteile]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band04 p49 -->
